top_gaps: the gap between sleeping and waking
the gap between loneliness and connection
the gap between dying and being born
the gap between wanting and having
the gap between the self and the world
the gap between form and formlessness
the gap between seeing and being seen
the gap between separation and oneness
the gap between fear and love
the gap between sound and silence

workflow.human: Search no-key public art sources with a small limit.
Each item keeps title, artist, date, image, source, URL, license if available.
workflow.agent: Use source + id as the stable external key.

workflow.human: Add tags, preview, counts, and optional AI interpretation.
workflow.agent: GET /api/pipeline/enrich?id=ART_ID or use data/agent-feed.json for lightweight enrichment.

workflow.human: Open Markdown or the site UI.
Commit generated data/ files and deploy static Pages.
